datasets.name: b477f1a1
queryLines:
SELECT 
    beneficiary_account_name, 
    is_beneficiary_customer,
    originator_account_name,
    is_originator_customer, 
    sum(total_value) AS total_value, 
    max(max_value) AS max_value, 
    min(min_value) as min_value, 
    avg(avg_value) as avg_value, 
    min(first_transaction_date) AS first_transaction_date, 
    max(last_transaction_date) AS last_transaction_date  
  FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.view_banking_supply_chains 
  WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
     AND beneficiary_account_name = :p_beneficiary_account_name
  GROUP BY beneficiary_account_name, originator_account_name, is_beneficiary_customer, is_originator_customer
--    AND is_beneficiary_customer = :p_is_beneficiary_customer
--    AND is_originator_customer = :p_is_originator_customer

datasets.name: a8c371b6
queryLines:
SELECT Distinct beneficiary_account_name, is_beneficiary_customer
  FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.view_banking_supply_chains
  WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
  ORDER BY beneficiary_account_name ASC

datasets.name: 193c0a20
queryLines:
SELECT 
    beneficiary_account_name, 
    is_beneficiary_customer,
    beneficiary_account_country, 
    originator_account_name,
    is_originator_customer, 
    originator_account_country, 
    datetime as transaction_datetime, 
    amount as transaction_amount, 
    debit_or_credit_code, 
    original_currency_code, 
    currency_code as beneficary_currency_code  
  FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.view_banking_supply_chain_transactions
  WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    AND beneficiary_account_name = :p_beneficiary_account_name 
--    AND is_beneficiary_customer = :p_is_beneficiary_customer
--    AND is_originator_customer = :p_is_originator_customer

  ORDER BY datetime

datasets.name: 9fee711a
queryLines:
SELECT
    originator_account_name AS stage1,
    beneficiary_account_name AS stage2,
    sum(total_value) AS value

 FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.view_banking_supply_chains
 WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    AND beneficiary_account_name = :p_beneficiary_account_name 
 GROUP BY originator_account_name, beneficiary_account_name
 ORDER BY beneficiary_account_name, originator_account_name DESC

datasets.name: cd300530
queryLines:
SELECT
    originator_account_name AS stage1,
    beneficiary_account_name AS stage2,
    sum(total_value) AS value

 FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.view_banking_supply_chains
 WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
 GROUP BY originator_account_name, beneficiary_account_name
 ORDER BY beneficiary_account_name, originator_account_name DESC

datasets.name: 0879f187
queryLines:
SELECT 
    organisation_name, 
    data_source_code, 
    organisation_id
FRoM demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.sat_organisation
WHERE organisation_name in 
    (SELECT organisation_name FROM demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.sat_organisation WHERE organisation_name IN 
        (SELECT beneacc.account_name 
           FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.sat_banking_supply_chain h
           JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_accounts_all.sat_account beneacc
               ON beneacc.account_id = h.bene_account_id
           WHERE h.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name    
        
         UNION   
         SELECT origacc.account_name 
           FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.sat_banking_supply_chain h
           JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_accounts_all.sat_account origacc
               ON origacc.account_id = h.orig_account_id
           WHERE h.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name    
        
         )    
    )    

ORDER BY organisation_name

datasets.name: 1af8fba7
queryLines:
SELECT * 
FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.fact_cash_flow_3
WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    AND stage3 = :p_beneficiary_account_name

UNION

SELECT * 
FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.fact_cash_flow_3
WHERE stage2 IN (
    SELECT stage2
    FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.fact_cash_flow_3
    WHERE tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
        AND stage3 = :p_beneficiary_account_name 
) AND stage1 IS NOT NULL

datasets.name: 9c297ce8
queryLines:
SELECT 
  h.tennant_id,
  s.organisation_name,
  s.type_code as organisation_type_code,
  s.status_code as organisation_status_code,
  s.trading_name,
  s.legal_structure_type_code,
  s.company_category_code,
  s.data_source_code AS how_known_to_network,
  s.company_registration_name,
  s.company_registration_number,
  s.company_registration_date,
  s.company_registration_place,
  s.company_registration_country_code,
  s.primary_operation_country_code,
  s.secondary_operation_country_code

    FROM demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.hub_organisation h
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.sat_organisation s
      ON h.organisation_id = s.organisation_id
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_refcodes_all.tennant t
      ON h.tennant_id = t.tennant_id
      WHERE t.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    ORDER BY organisation_name
;

datasets.name: e7256cb7
queryLines:
SELECT 
  h.tennant_id,
	h.individual_entity_id,
  ihn.full_name,
	s.gender_code,
	s.birth_date,
	s.marital_status_code,
	s.nationality_code,
	s.country_of_residence_code,
	ihn.is_trusted AS is_trusted_name,
  ihn.use_code AS name_use_code,
  ihn.given1 AS given_name_1,
  ihn.given2 AS given_name_2,
  ihn.given3 AS given_name_3,
  ihn.given4 AS given_name_4,
  ihn.given5 AS given_name_5,
  ihn.family AS family_name,
  ihn.initials,
  ihn.is_preferred,
	s.is_deceased,
	s.deceased_datetime,
	s.ethnicity_code,
	s.religion_code,
	s.occupation_code,
	s.is_employee,
	s.is_ex_employee,
	s.is_graduate,
	s.is_interpreter_required,
	s.is_employed,
	s.is_retired,
	s.is_student,
	s.is_individual_merged,
	s.period_start AS ind_sat_period_start,
	s.period_end AS ind_sat_period_end

    FROM demo_banking_silver.qdp_individuals_all.hub_individual h
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_individuals_all.sat_individual s
      ON h.individual_id = s.individual_id
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_individuals_all.sat_human_name ihn 
      ON h.individual_id = ihn.individual_id
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_refcodes_all.tennant t
      ON h.tennant_id = t.tennant_id
      WHERE t.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    ORDER BY individual_entity_id, name_use_code
;

datasets.name: 5e15a228
queryLines:
SELECT 
    h.address_id,
    h.address_entity_id,
    s.postal_code,
    s.full_address,
    s.type_code,
    s.data_source_code as how_known_to_network,
    s.house_number,
    s.house_name,
    s.building_number,
    s.building_name,
    s.address_line1,
    s.address_line2,
    s.address_line3,
    s.address_line4,
    s.address_line5,
    s.address_line6,
    s.address_line7,
    s.address_line8,
    s.street,
    s.district,
    s.city,
    s.county,
    s.state,
    s.country,
    s.country_code,
    s.country_concept_id,
    s.country_raw_code,
    s.country_raw_concept_id,
    s.uprn,
    s.what3words,
    s.latitude,
    s.longitude,
    s.directions,
    s.type_concept_id,
    s.type_raw_code,
    s.type_raw_concept_id,
    s.period_start AS sat_address_period_start,
    s.period_end AS sat_address_period_end,
    s.load_datetime,
    s.record_source_id,
    s.data_source_concept_id,
    s.data_source_raw_code,
    s.data_source_raw_concept_id

    FROM demo_banking_silver.qdp_locations_all.hub_address h
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_locations_all.sat_address s
      ON h.address_id = s.address_id
    JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_refcodes_all.tennant t
      ON h.tennant_id = t.tennant_id
      WHERE t.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name
    ORDER BY s.postal_code
;

datasets.name: 13ffa0da
queryLines:
SELECT h.tennant_id, t.tennant_name, s.organisation_name, s.company_registration_country_code
 FROM demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.hub_organisation h
 JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.sat_organisation s
   ON h.organisation_id = s.organisation_id
 JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_organisations_all.sat_organisation_risk_scores r   
   ON s.organisation_id = r.organisation_id
 JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_refcodes_all.tennant t
   ON h.tennant_id = t.tennant_id
 WHERE t.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name AND 
       r.risk_code = 'High Risk Country'
 ORDER BY  s.organisation_name

datasets.name: db85ebcf
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT h.stage3 AS organisationName, 
                h.tennant_id, 
                t.tennant_name 
  FROM demo_banking_gold.qdp_banking_supply_chain.fact_cash_flow_3 h
   JOIN demo_banking_silver.qdp_refcodes_all.tennant t
     ON h.tennant_id = t.tennant_id

  WHERE t.tennant_name = :p_tennant_name AND 
        stage3 IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY organisationName
